finding_corrected: The prior report schema required two runs for every fixture while the frozen execution plan requires held-out execution exactly once; simply allowing one run would have falsely counted held-out fixtures as repeatability evidence.
enforced_invariants: every fixture declares calibration or held_out partition
calibration fixtures require at least two runs
held-out fixtures require exactly one run
repeatability is calculated only across calibration fixtures
calibration and held-out fixture and run counts are explicit certificate metrics
report and certificate bind the execution-matrix SHA-256
execution-matrix identity drift suspends an otherwise qualified certificate
both calibration and held-out partitions must be represented
the package inventory schema and aggregate validator recognize all 17 retained package records including the provisional InternVL3.5-8B record without granting it juror substitution authority
next_action: Bind the deterministic role executor to the frozen matrix, run calibration cases at least twice, freeze thresholds, run each held-out case exactly once, and compile the first scoped certificate without contacting the GPU pod.
